name: staircase
hints: A condemned staircase with rabid rats blocking the way down. You need to deal with them.
The rats block WALK DOWN. WALK UP returns to the storeroom. There is a small hole in the wall you can GO HOLE to reach under the stairs.
WALK UP (to storeroom), WALK DOWN (blocked by rats until removed), GO HOLE (to under the stairs with a star). Do NOT cast AT STAIRCASE - it burns you.
Deal with the rats by using a spell or item, then WALK DOWN to reach the anteroom. GO HOLE leads to under the stairs (room 18) where another star awaits.

effects: Message: I burnt to a crisp.

notes: Condemned staircase with rabid rats. WALK UP to storeroom (room 11). WALK DOWN blocked by rats (leads to anteroom 13 when clear). GO HOLE leads under the stairs (room 18, has a star). WARNING: AT STAIRCASE (casting fire spell at stairs) burns you to death. Must remove rats by other means.
